purpose: Premium occasion announcement video with native audio. National Day, Founding Day, major Eid.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: — {cultural_constraints_injection} | Motion: Premium occasion announcement video for {occasion_descriptor}: cinematic opening showing occasion-appropriate visual motif (Saudi flag draping, traditional Najdi architecture, palm fronds), warm directional lighting, brand visual element subtly appears, peaceful ceremonial pace, native ambient occasion sound, 7 seconds
anti_patterns: Avoid trying to substitute with image-to-video fallback chain — native generation is the point
notes: Intents: all. Source code in research corpus: V04. Saudi adaptation guidance: Most weighted occasion chain. Native audio essential. Auto-triggers at major occasions. Reference image: Not required. Recommended frequency: 1 per major occasion.
